page_metadata.biotools__summary: VisionTool is a python toolbox for pose estimation on videos containing actions. It is powered with a simple and intuititive Graphical User Interface (GUI) to allow a complete analysis from annotation to semantic features detection (e.g., joint position estimation).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: VisionTool is a python toolbox for pose estimation on videos containing actions. It is powered with a simple and intuititive Graphical User Interface (GUI) to allow a complete analysis from annotation to semantic features detection (e.g., joint position estimation).
